keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY SEDIMENT. Sediment : Canth., Coloc., Lyc., Pho-ac., Pul., Sep., Val., Zin. Sediment, adherent : Ap., Coloc., Fer., Pho., Pul., Sep. Sediment, bloody : Canth., Pho-ac., Pul., Sep. Sediment, clayey , earthy : Zin. Sediment, cloudy : Pho-ac. Sediment, flaky : Canth., Mez., Zin. Sediment, mucous : Berb., Pul., Terb. Sediment, red , brickdust, etc. : Bry., Canth., Chin., Lyc., Nat-m., Pul., Sep., Val. Sediment, sandy : Lyc., Sars. Sediment, white : Pho., Rhus-t. Sediment, yellow : Zin. Micturition, concomitants : Cann., Merc., Pul. Micturition, concomitants, before urination : Bor., Coloc., Nux-v., Pul. Micturition, concomitants, at start of urination : Merc. Micturition, concomitants, during urination : Cann., Canth., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Pho-ac., Pul., Sep., Thu. Micturition, concomitants, after urination : Canth., Coloc., Hep., Merc-c., Nat-m., Thu. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
